data.title: Writer Steve Hayden, creator of Apple’s iconic ’1984’ ad, passes away at 78. The groundbreaking commercial aired during Super Bowl and is unforgettable.
data.description: The commercial for the Macintosh computer, which aired only once during the Super Bowl, is widely regarded as one of the most iconic advertisements ever created.

data.title: Eventgroove collaborates with The American Legion for USA 250 Challenge in Bozeman, Mont; marks 250 years of independence.
data.description: In Bozeman, Montana on September 4, 2025, Eventgroove disclosed its partnership with The American Legion for the USA 250 Challenge. This initiative marks 250 years of American independence and aims to promote the cause on a national scale. Eventgroove, known for its comprehensive event, fundraising, and ecommerce tools, will work in conjunction with The American Legion to support this milestone celebration.

data.title: RWAs to enhance tokenized ESG investment, potentially attracting billions for climate projects via blockchain "trust" layer.
data.description: Residential Welfare Associations (RWAs) are projected to attract billions in climate investments by introducing a novel blockchain-powered "trust" layer tailored for institutional investors. Through this innovative approach, RWAs could potentially tap into significant financial resources to support climate initiatives and drive sustainable development.

data.title: Freddy’s acquired by Rhône from Thompson Street Capital Partners for market expansion. 550+ locations, $1B generated in system-wide sales.
data.description: A global private equity firm, Rhône, has acquired Freddy’s, a popular fast-casual restaurant chain based in Wichita, Kansas. The purchase was made from Thompson Street Capital Partners, a middle-market private equity firm located in St. Louis, Missouri. Freddy’s, known for its made-to-order steakburgers, shoestring fries, and frozen custard treats, boasts over 550 locations across the United States and Canada. The chain has generated over $1 billion in system-wide sales, solidifying its position in the competitive restaurant industry.

data.title: LATAM crypto-native traffic dropped by 54% in Q2, with visits falling from 17.85M to 8.19M. Mainstream media gained 20M visits.
data.description: In Q2, Latin America's crypto media landscape saw a significant decline as crypto-native traffic fell by 54% quarter-on-quarter, dropping from 17.85 million visits in Q1 to 8.19 million in Q2. This steep downturn marked the largest decrease recorded by Outset PR since the reports began. Monthly breakdowns showed a consistent accelerating decline from 3.35M visits in April to 2.19M in June. On the other hand, generalist outlets in finance, tech, and news portals with crypto sections faced traffic dips, but the larger players helped this category grow from 243.8 million visits in Q1 to 263.2 million in Q2. The growth of mainstream media outlets indicates a shift in crypto visibility towards broader media, implying a decreased narrative influence for crypto-native platforms in Latin America. This shift suggests that the story of crypto adoption in the region is now primarily filtered through mainstream lenses rather than community-driven media channels.

data.title: Beer Institute estimated 12,625,000 taxable removals in July 2025, down by 0.8% from July 2024's 12,724,742 barrels.
data.description: In September 4, 2025, it was reported that an unofficial estimate of taxable removals for July 2025 was released, totaling 12,625,000 barrels. This marked a decrease of 0.8% in comparison to the taxable removals in July 2024, which stood at 12,724,742 barrels. The Tax and Trade Bureau (TTB) measured this data in 31 gallon barrels. This data indicates a slight decrease in removals over the year. More information on this can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Noble Environmental closes $100M Pennsylvania Economic Development Financing Authority Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds.
data.description: Noble Environmental, Inc., based in Canonsburg, Pennsylvania, has successfully closed its initial issuance of $100.0 million in Pennsylvania Economic Development Financing Authority Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds (Noble Environmental, Inc. Project), Series 2025. The company announced the completion of the sale of these bonds. Noble Environmental, Inc. confirmed the sale of $100.0 million in aggregate principal amount of bonds by the Pennsylvania Economic Development Financing Authority.

data.title: Hertz gives fans unique experience at Lone Star Le Mans race, bringing interactive events and excitement.
data.description: In Estero, Florida, the World Endurance Championship (WEC) is set to hold its sole U.S. event at Austin’s Circuit of the Americas (COTA) on Sunday, Sept. 7. Hertz, in collaboration with Cadillac Hertz Team JOTA, is offering fans a thrilling weekend filled with racing, interactive contests, and unique opportunities highlighting the thrill of endurance racing. As part of the festivities, Hertz is organizing the Hertz Gold Kart Series to engage motorsports enthusiasts before the main race at COTA. This event aims to bring excitement to fans and provide a glimpse into the world of endurance racing like never seen before.

data.title: Verizon CEO to speak at Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference on Sept. 8 at 11:50 a.m. ET. Webcast will be available on Verizon's Investor Relations website.
data.description: Verizon's Chairman and CEO, Hans Vestberg, will address the Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference on September 8 at 11:50 a.m. ET. The event, scheduled to be webcast, will feature Vestberg's insights. To access the webcast, interested parties should visit the Investor Relations section of Verizon's website at www.verizon.com/about/investors.

data.title: Brilliant NextGen Inc. secures $9.7M funding, adds Tony Smalls to board for product innovation and growth.
data.description: Announced today, Brilliant NextGen Inc., a prominent smart home control technology innovator based in San Mateo, California, has successfully secured $9.7 million in funding from current investor Almeida Strategic Investments and Tyrod Taylor’s Strategic Investments Fund. Tony Smalls, CPA, CGMA, and Partner at MGO as well as the CEO of Smarthomes Solutions, has been appointed to the Board of Directors with immediate effect. The influx of new capital and the addition of a new board member aim to bolster the company's growth and development.
